Number
Description

2006 and incorporated herein by reference thereto).
Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation of The Western Union Company, as filed with the Secretary of

K filed on June 3, 2013 and incorporated herein by reference thereto).

thereto).

and incorporated herein by reference thereto).

2, 2006 and incorporated herein by reference thereto).

on December 22, 2006 and incorporated herein by reference thereto).
